name: Surprise Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mix together the softened cream cheese, sugar, and beaten egg until well combined.
3. Spread the mixture evenly in a greased baking dish.
4. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until set.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
